name: Sulphadiazine + Sulphadimidine + Sulphapyridine (Veterinary) | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: This is indicated for the treatment of systemic and intestinal infections caused by Sulphonamide sensitive organisms such as diarrhoea, dysentry, pneumonia, diphtheria, hemorrhagic septicemia, navel ill, urinary infections, infectious arthritis to prevent secondary bacterial infections in viral diseases.
dosage_&amp;_administration: One bolus per 35 kg body weight at the first day of treatment and then half bolus per 35 kg body weight for next 4 to 7 consecutive days. This may be administered with water or food (like molasses) or directly wrapped with banana leaf. Or as directed by the veterinary physician.
contraindications: Should not be used for the animals suffering from renal dysfunction and hypersensitive to sulphonamides.
pregnancy_&amp;_lactation: Should not be use in pregnant animal.
precautions_&amp;_warnings: Precautions: Sufficient drinking water should be given during treatment of the animal.withdrawal period: Meat-15 days Milk-03 days.
storage_conditions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from light. Keep all medicines out of reach of children.
